title: Morning at the Office
scene: 周一早上，你刚到办公室和同事打招呼。

turns.cn: 早上好！周末过得怎么样？
turns.en: Good morning! How was your weekend?

turns.cn: 挺好的，去看了场电影。你呢？
turns.en: It was good. I went to see a movie. How about you?

turns.cn: 在家休息，补了觉。
turns.en: I just stayed home and caught up on sleep.

turns.cn: 今天有什么会议吗？
turns.en: Do we have any meetings today?

turns.cn: 十点有个团队周会。
turns.en: There's a team stand-up at ten o'clock.

turns.cn: 好的，我准备一下材料。
turns.en: Okay, I'll get my materials ready.

turns.cn: 咖啡机修好了，要不要来一杯？
turns.en: The coffee machine is fixed. Want a cup?

turns.cn: 太好了，来杯黑咖啡，谢谢！
turns.en: That'd be great. Black coffee, please. Thanks!

title: Asking for a Day Off
scene: 你需要请一天假，去找老板商量。

turns.cn: 老板，您现在方便吗？我想请一天假。
turns.en: Do you have a moment? I'd like to request a day off.

turns.cn: 哪天？什么事？
turns.en: Which day? What's the reason?

turns.cn: 下周五，家里有点急事要处理。
turns.en: Next Friday. I have a family matter to take care of.

turns.cn: 那天有个项目截止，能提前完成吗？
turns.en: There's a project deadline that day. Can you finish ahead of time?

turns.cn: 可以的，我周四之前交。
turns.en: Yes, I can have it done by Thursday.

turns.cn: 好的，批准了。有事提前安排好。
turns.en: All right, it's approved. Just make sure everything is covered.

turns.cn: 谢谢老板，我会跟同事交接好的。
turns.en: Thank you. I'll coordinate with the team.

title: Conference Call
scene: 你正在参加一个国际电话会议。

turns.cn: 你能分享一下项目进展吗？
turns.en: Could you share an update on the project?

turns.cn: 当然。目前进度正常，预计下周完成。
turns.en: Sure. We're on track and expect to finish next week.

turns.cn: 有什么困难或需要支持的吗？
turns.en: Are there any challenges or support you need?

turns.cn: 我们需要设计团队配合，能帮忙协调吗？
turns.en: We need help from the design team. Could you coordinate that?

turns.cn: 没问题，我今天联系他们。
turns.en: No problem. I'll reach out to them today.

turns.cn: 谢谢！我周五再发一份详细报告。
turns.en: Thank you! I'll send a detailed report on Friday.

turns.cn: 好的，辛苦了。
turns.en: Sounds good. Great work.

title: Printer Problem
scene: 你需要打印文件，但打印机出了问题。

turns.cn: 你好，三楼打印机打不出来。
turns.en: Hi, the printer on the third floor isn't working.

turns.cn: 有什么报错信息吗？
turns.en: Is there any error message?

turns.cn: 显示卡纸了，但我没看到纸卡在里面。
turns.en: It says paper jam, but I don't see any paper stuck.

turns.cn: 我过去看一下，你先重启试试。
turns.en: I'll come take a look. Try restarting it first.

turns.cn: 重启了还是不行。
turns.en: I restarted it, but it still doesn't work.

turns.cn: 我修好了，是进纸器的问题。
turns.en: I fixed it. It was the paper feeder.

turns.cn: 太好了，谢谢！
turns.en: Great, thank you!

title: Welcoming a New Colleague
scene: 部门来了新同事，你负责带他熟悉环境。

turns.cn: 欢迎加入！我是张伟，坐你旁边。
turns.en: Welcome aboard! I'm Zhang Wei. I sit right next to you.

turns.cn: 你好！我是 Lisa，很高兴认识你。
turns.en: Hi! I'm Lisa. Nice to meet you.

turns.cn: 茶水间在那边，午餐一般十二点。
turns.en: The break room is over there. Lunch is usually at noon.

turns.cn: 公司附近有好吃的餐厅吗？
turns.en: Are there any good restaurants nearby?

turns.cn: 转角那家三明治店不错，也常点外卖。
turns.en: The sandwich shop on the corner is good. We order delivery a lot too.

turns.cn: 太好了。有问题可以请教你吗？
turns.en: That's great. Can I ask you if I have questions?

turns.cn: 随时欢迎，中午一起吃饭吧。
turns.en: Anytime. Let's grab lunch together.

title: Requesting Time Off
scene: 你需要请假，向主管说明并交接工作。

turns.cn: 经理，我想请下周五一天假。
turns.en: Manager, I'd like to take next Friday off.

turns.cn: 家里有事吗？那天有客户演示。
turns.en: Family matter? We have a client demo that day.

turns.cn: 家人生病要陪诊，演示材料我今天发您。
turns.en: A family member needs a hospital visit. I'll send you the demo materials today.

turns.cn: 谁顶你的会？
turns.en: Who will cover your meetings?

turns.cn: 我和 Lisa 对过了，她可以代开晨会。
turns.en: Lisa and I aligned. She can run the morning stand-up.

turns.cn: 好，系统里提交申请就行。
turns.en: Okay. Submit the request in the system.

turns.cn: 谢谢，我会保持手机畅通。
turns.en: Thank you. I'll keep my phone on.

title: Salary Negotiation
scene: 年度评估后，你和 HR 谈加薪。

turns.cn: 感谢您这一年的贡献，我们提议涨薪百分之五。
turns.en: Thanks for your contributions this year. We're proposing a five percent raise.

turns.cn: 感谢认可。根据市场和我的项目成果，我希望百分之八到十。
turns.en: I appreciate that. Based on market rates and my project results, I was hoping for eight to ten percent.

turns.cn: 预算有限，最多百分之七，外加两千签约奖。
turns.en: Budget is tight. Seven percent is the max, plus a two-thousand signing retention bonus.

turns.cn: 可以换成多两天年假吗？
turns.en: Could we trade for two extra vacation days instead?

turns.cn: 年假可以加一天，薪资按百分之七。
turns.en: We can add one vacation day with the seven percent.

turns.cn: 好的，我接受，谢谢。
turns.en: Okay, I accept. Thank you.

turns.cn: 下周发更新后的 offer letter。
turns.en: We'll send an updated offer letter next week.

title: Annual Review
scene: 你和经理进行年度绩效面谈。

turns.cn: 总体表现优秀，客户反馈很好。
turns.en: Overall excellent performance. Great client feedback.

turns.cn: 谢谢。有哪些我可以改进的？
turns.en: Thank you. What should I improve?

turns.cn: 跨部门沟通可以更主动，文档再细致些。
turns.en: Be more proactive with cross-team communication and documentation.

turns.cn: 明年我想带一个新项目，可以吗？
turns.en: I'd like to lead a new project next year. Is that possible?

turns.cn: 可以，第二季度有个机会。
turns.en: Yes, there's an opening in Q2.

turns.cn: 我需要什么培训支持？
turns.en: What training support would help?

turns.cn: 公司报销项目管理证书，我帮你申请。
turns.en: The company covers PM certification. I'll help you apply.

title: Resignation
scene: 你找到新工作，向经理提出离职。

turns.cn: 经理，您现在方便吗？我有件事想和您谈。
turns.en: Manager, do you have a moment? I need to talk to you about something.

turns.cn: 当然，请说。
turns.en: Of course. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 我接受了另一家公司的 offer，两周后离职。
turns.en: I've accepted another offer. I'll be leaving in two weeks.

turns.cn: 很遗憾，方便说原因吗？
turns.en: I'm sorry to hear that. May I ask why?

turns.cn: 主要是职业发展，和您无关，我很感谢这里的经历。
turns.en: Mostly career growth. It's not about you. I'm grateful for my time here.

turns.cn: 理解。请帮我把手头项目交接好。
turns.en: I understand. Please help transition your projects.

turns.cn: 一定，我会写详细的交接文档。
turns.en: Absolutely. I'll write detailed handover notes.

title: Job Handover
scene: 离职前你和接任同事交接工作。

turns.cn: 客户名单和进度表在哪？
turns.en: Where are the client list and status tracker?

turns.cn: 在共享盘这个文件夹，红色是紧急的。
turns.en: In this shared folder. Red items are urgent.

turns.cn: 每周例会谁主持？
turns.en: Who runs the weekly meeting?

turns.cn: 一直是我在主持，以后你来，我教你流程。
turns.en: I have been. You'll take over. I'll walk you through it.

turns.cn: 供应商联系人呢？
turns.en: What about vendor contacts?

turns.cn: 都在通讯录，王经理主要对接采购。
turns.en: All in the address book. Manager Wang handles procurement.

turns.cn: 太感谢了，以后有问题还能问你吗？
turns.en: Thanks so much. Can I reach out if I get stuck?

title: Exit Interview
scene: 离职前 HR 找你做离职面谈。

turns.cn: 感谢您的时间，方便说说离职原因吗？
turns.en: Thanks for your time. Can you share why you're leaving?

turns.cn: 主要是想尝试新行业，薪资也有提升。
turns.en: Mainly to try a new industry. There's also a pay increase.

turns.cn: 公司有什么可以改进的吗？
turns.en: Anything we could have done better?

turns.cn: 跨部门流程有点慢，其他都很好。
turns.en: Cross-team processes were a bit slow. Otherwise things were good.

turns.cn: 理解。最后工作日是下周五对吧？
turns.en: Understood. Your last day is next Friday, correct?

turns.cn: 对，年假我会用完。
turns.en: Yes. I'll use my remaining vacation days.

turns.cn: 祝新工作顺利，保持联系。
turns.en: Best of luck. Let's stay in touch.
